title: Silky Irish Kale Chowder
description: A bright, citrus‑infused kale chowder that’s silky smooth and plant‑based, finished with a splash of deglazed wine and lemon zest for a touch of Irish charm.

ingredients.name: white wine
ingredients.notes: use a dry, non‑alcoholic option if preferred

instructions: Heat olive oil and vegan butter in a large pot over medium heat until melted.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, diced carrot, and chopped celery; cook another 3 minutes until vegetables start to soften.
Add chopped kale, smoked paprika, thyme, bay leaf, and a pinch of salt; stir to coat the greens with the aromatics.
Pour in the white wine, allowing it to simmer for 2 minutes to deglaze the pot and lift the browned bits from the bottom.
Add vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in oat milk, coconut cream, maple syrup, lemon zest, and lemon juice; simmer for an additional 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Use an immersion blender or transfer a portion to a blender to puree until silky smooth; return to pot and stir through.
Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste; remove bay leaf.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a swirl of coconut cream and a sprinkle of lemon zest.
Enjoy the comforting, citrus‑bright, plant‑based chowder that feels indulgently Irish.
